item.title: Turkey says it’s engaging with all sides to end Iran war
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Foreign minister Hakan Fidan says Ankara is also in talks with Oman on the matter as the Gulf nation works towards the same goal.
Matched: breaking(+3), law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: ‘Scammers paying to target Malaysians’: Fahmi vows crackdown on deepfake social media ads under new law

item.title: PAC urges Felcra to reconsider 30,000ha land bank target
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The committee says Felcra has achieved only 13% of the target.

item.title: Lawyers dismiss claims Naimah Khalid out to topple government
item.description:

item.title: PKR man denies failure to pass bill sign of weak support for PM
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Batu PKR chief Asheeq Ali Sethi Alivi says the failure to pass the bill to limit the prime minister’s term is due to a lack of commitment among certain BN MPs.
Matched: law(+3), parliament(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Bar fails to prove legal interest in BM constitution suit, court rules
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today

Matched: law(+3), court(+2), ai(+3), breach(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: World Cup ticket frenzy unfolds amid challenges
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
World Cup 2026 ticket sales were oversubscribed 30 times, despite global unrest and high prices deterring fans.
Matched: policy(+3), budget(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Asia scrambles for LNG as Qatar halts output due to Iran war
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
US, Israeli strikes on Iran have choked tanker traffic, halted Qatari LNG output of which more than 80% exported to Asia.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today

item.title: India’s Sindhu withdraws from All England Open after Dubai ordeal
